vlm_note: The empty_baseline overlay was ~73px horizontally off for this frame (the video panned between empty_baseline and post_setup), so I re-fit directly from post_setup (read_board_stable) and read every piece against post_setup coordinates. Colours per meta: Dashed=RED, ThePhantom=BLACK (both match on screen). ThePhantom (BLACK) settlements v6 (WOO5/ORE6/WOO10) and v4 (WHE11/SHE9/BRI4), roads v6-v12 (up-right) and v4-v19 (down-left). Dashed (RED) settlements v11 (ORE6/ORE9/BRI12) and v22 (BRI4/WHE6/WOO3), roads v11-v10 (straight down) and v22-v9 (up-right). GRANT SELF-CHECK PASSES: ThePhantom grant {BRICK:1, SHEEP:1, WHEAT:1} equals EXACTLY v4's hexes and NOT v6's ({WOOD,WOOD,ORE}); Dashed grant {BRICK:1, WHEAT:1, WOOD:1} equals EXACTLY v22's hexes and NOT v11's ({ORE,ORE,BRICK}). Each grant matches exactly one settlement; all four roads resolve to real edges.
